title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — GoThru Maps Frontend

issues.main_description_html:
• Upgrade nextjs version

QA Tester Summary - Issue #90: Security Vulnerability Fixes

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/security/nextjs-upgrade.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co
Result: PASSED

Structure follows qa_testing/qa_template.md: White / Gray / Black test.steps, a screenshot per step, one continuous fullscreen recording.

Test Scenario & Result

Step Type What the test verifies Result
1 White Box The upgraded Next.js dependency is declared in package.json. Pass
2 Gray Box The upgraded Next.js app boots and loads framework static assets. Pass
3 Black Box Malformed framework/static paths fail closed without exposing content or returning HTTP 5xx. Pass
4 Response codes No HTTP 5xx responses occur during the flow. Pass

Validation Details

Check Observed Result
Declared Next.js version 16.2.6
Minimum expected Next.js version 16.2.6
App shell route Loaded successfully
Next static bootstrap scripts Present
/_next/static/../server/app/page.js 404
/_next/static/%2e%2e/server/app/page.js 404
/_next/image?url=javascript:alert(1)&w=64&q=75 400
HTTP 5xx server responses 0 - none

Code Review Scope

Reviewed Area Scope Based on GitHub Task Review Result
Dependency declaration Confirm package.json declares the upgraded Next.js version required by the task. Pass - next is declared as 16.2.6.
Runtime boot path Confirm the upgraded Next.js app still boots on production through a real map route. Pass - the app shell loaded and the map route rendered.
Next.js static assets Confirm framework bootstrap assets are present after the upgrade. Pass - /_next/static/ scripts were detected in the rendered page.
Security regression probes Confirm malformed Next.js framework/image paths fail closed. Pass - probes returned 404, 404, and 400; no exposed 200 response.
Server error monitoring Confirm the tested flow does not introduce HTTP 5xx responses. Pass - HTTP 5xx count was 0.
Out-of-scope code Anything unrelated to the GitHub task, including map UI behavior, marker business logic, search behavior, and styling. Not reviewed in this summary.

Task Sprint tags: @regression @sanity_test @security @task_sprint @viewer @#security @production

APIs Hit & Response Codes

Endpoint group Status
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles* 200
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/fonts/* 200
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/* 200
maps.gothru.co/data/moderation_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200
maps.gothru.co/icon/markers/* 200
socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 / 400

Bug Notes

None found in this run. The upgraded Next.js version is declared, the production app boots, malformed framework probes fail closed, and no HTTP 5xx responses were observed.

Evidence Note

The replacement recording shows the maximized browser with the Chrome address bar visible, while the app/map content fills the browser viewport below it. Screenshots capture the White Box, Gray Box, and Black Box validation steps.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-90-NextjsUpgrade-BrowserChromeFullV2-1782202554437.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #72: Remove Nearby button on panorra popup
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #72: Remove Nearby Button on Panorra Popup

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-remove-nearby-button.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium - headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co/embed/panorra?nobutton=true
Result: PASSED

Structure follows qa_testing/qa_template.md: White / Gray / Black test.steps, a screenshot per step, one continuous browser-chrome recording with the address bar visible.

Test Scenario & Result

Step Type What the test verifies Result
1 White Box The Panorra embed map opens with popup buttons disabled via nobutton=true. Pass
2 Gray Box A Panorra marker popup still opens when action buttons are disabled. Pass
3 Black Box The removed Nearby action is not present, and popup action buttons are hidden. Pass
4 Response codes No HTTP 5xx responses occur during the flow. Pass

Validation Details

Check Observed Result
Route under test /embed/panorra?nobutton=true
Map renders Yes
Marker popup opens Yes
Nearby text/action in popup 0 found
Popup action buttons with nobutton=true 0 found
HTTP 5xx server responses 0 - none

Code Review Scope

Reviewed Area Scope Based on GitHub Task Review Result
Popup button control Confirm nobutton=true maps to hideButtons for Panorra popup rendering. Pass - src/app/embed/panorra/page.tsx reads nobutton=true and passes hideButtons into MapContainer.
Panorra source wiring Confirm hideButtons reaches the popup component. Pass - PanorraSource forwards hideButtons to CustomPopup.
Popup action rendering Confirm action buttons are conditionally hidden. Pass - CustomPopup renders the CTA only when !hideButtons.
Removed Nearby action Confirm the tested popup does not expose Nearby text/action. Pass - runtime popup text contained no Nearby match.
Regression surface Confirm removing/hiding popup actions does not break popup opening. Pass - marker popup still opened and rendered content.
Out-of-scope code Anything unrelated to the GitHub task, including marker clustering, map style, search, and unrelated Panorra event messages. Not reviewed in this summary.

Task Sprint tags: @regression @sanity_test @unit_test @task_sprint @viewer @#panorra

APIs Hit & Response Codes

Endpoint group Status
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles* 200
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/fonts/* 200
map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/* 200
maps.gothru.co/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200
maps.gothru.co/embed/panorra 200
maps.gothru.co/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png 200
socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200

Bug Notes

None found in this run. The Nearby action is absent, popup action buttons are hidden when nobutton=true, and the Panorra popup still opens normally.

Evidence Note

The recording shows a maximized browser with the Chrome address bar visible, while the app/map content fills the browser viewport below it. Screenshots capture the White Box, Gray Box, and Black Box validation steps.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-72-RemoveNearbyButton-Clean-1782207686508.mp4
